name: run-alembic
description: Run alembic database migrations with config file, replacing cd + CONFIG= + venv/bin/alembic chains.

parameters.name: command
parameters.description: Alembic command and args (upgrade head, downgrade -1, etc.)

parameters.name: --config
parameters.description: Path to env config file with KEY=VALUE lines (sets CONFIG env var)

parameters.name: --python
parameters.description: Path to Python interpreter (default: auto-detect venv/bin/python)

parameters.name: --brief
parameters.description: Filter out verbose app DEBUG/INFO and alembic INFO log lines, showing only migration status

parameters.name: --head
parameters.description: Show only first N lines of output (replaces | head -N chains)

parameters.name: --tail
parameters.description: Show only last N lines of output (replaces | tail -N chains)

examples.expected: Migration log with verbose app/alembic INFO lines filtered out

cost_saving_rationale: Collapses cd + CONFIG=export + venv/bin/alembic into one step, saving 1-2 agent steps per migration; --brief filters verbose log lines reducing observation cost by 80-90% on verbose migration output.
